description: Author a SUMO calibrator file to restrict traffic flow on the main arterial entry to 800 vehicles per hour for the first hour (0-3600 seconds) at a speed of 13.89 m/s. Identify the target edge by finding the first edge ID in the route file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio.rou.xml. Create the calibrator file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/calibrator.add.xml, ensuring it is configured to output logs to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/calibrator_log.xml. Update the simulation configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg to include this new additional file and run the simulation to generate the required logs.
